title: ResponseMetadata
description: Foundation metadata included by future bounded MCP read responses.

coverage.description: Coverage of the response's relevant fact domains.

generation.description: Immutable generation selected by the request.

trust.description: Trust classification for any source-bearing data in the response.

CoverageStatus.description: Completeness of a bounded fact or result set.

oneOf.description: The declared domain was completely analyzed.
A documented bound truncated the domain.

TrustClassification.description: Trust classification attached to every future source-bearing value.

oneOf.description: Content originated in a repository and must be treated as data.
